title: Protocol: add RX_ENTER/RX_EXIT/RX_PACKET/RX_TIMEOUT message types
description:
Add new message types to python/src/lichen/sim/protocol.py for push-based RX:

```python
# New message types
MSG_RX_ENTER = 0x24    # Renode → Sim: entering RX mode
MSG_RX_EXIT = 0x26     # Renode → Sim: leaving RX mode  
MSG_RX_PACKET = 0x27   # Sim → Renode: packet arrived (unsolicited)
MSG_RX_TIMEOUT = 0x28  # Sim → Renode: RX timeout (unsolicited)

def encode_rx_enter(timeout_us: int) -> bytes:
    """Encode RX_ENTER: 1-byte type + 4-byte LE timeout."""
    return struct.pack("<BI", MSG_RX_ENTER, timeout_us)

def decode_rx_enter(payload: bytes) -> int:
    """Decode RX_ENTER, return timeout_us."""
    return struct.unpack("<I", payload)[0]

def encode_rx_packet(payload: bytes, rssi: int, snr: int) -> bytes:
    """Encode RX_PACKET for push to Renode."""
    # Same format as RX_OK but different message type
    ...

def encode_rx_timeout() -> bytes:
    """Encode RX_TIMEOUT."""
    return struct.pack("<B", MSG_RX_TIMEOUT)
```

Keep RX_POLL/RX_OK/RX_EMPTY for now (removed in separate bead).
acceptance_criteria: New encode/decode functions exist and pass unit tests
close_reason: Added RX_ENTER/RX_EXIT/RX_PACKET/RX_TIMEOUT message types with encode/decode functions and tests
